category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Benin.

title.en: China-to-Benin EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入贝宁：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入貝寧：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Benin ANM / ARE / SBEE requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector expectations, SBEE grid-connection requirements, OCPP interoperability, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 baselines. Benin's EV market is extremely nascent; grid deficits, low electrification, and the dominance of two- and three-wheeled moto-taxi (zemidjan) transport frame the practical deployment context honestly.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与贝宁ANM / ARE / SBEE要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口预期、SBEE并网要求、OCPP互操作，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基线的差距对照。贝宁电动汽车市场极度初期，电网缺口、低电气化率以及双轮和三轮摩的（zemidjan）交通占主导地位，均客观影响实际部署环境。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與貝寧ANM / ARE / SBEE要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口預期、SBEE併網要求、OCPP互操作，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234基線的差距對照。貝寧電動汽車市場極度初期，電網缺口、低電氣化率以及雙輪和三輪摩的（zemidjan）交通佔主導地位，均客觀影響實際部署環境。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Benin, the confirmed practical gaps are: connector hardware redesign from GB/T 20234 to IEC 62196 Type 2 (AC) / CCS2 (DC), since Benin follows Francophone IEC alignment and GB/T connectors are physically incompatible with IEC 62196 vehicle inlets; IEC 61851-based safety evidence required for ANM conformity and ARE / SBEE project coordination; EMC evidence per IEC 61000 series; SBEE grid-connection coordination for any grid-connected installation (220/380 V, 50 Hz); and high-temperature and dust derating documentation for Benin's West African tropical climate. Critically, Benin's EV market is at an extremely early stage: four-wheel EV penetration is negligible, grid electrification is incomplete, and the most relevant near-term EV segment is electric two- and three-wheelers (e-moto / e-tricycle), not passenger-car fast chargers. Exporters must honestly assess demand, infrastructure readiness, and project finance before committing to shipment. No single official Beninese mandatory certification route for EV chargers as a product class could be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; the applicable path is ANM conformity + ARE / SBEE project coordination + IEC technical standards.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入贝宁时，已确认的实务差距包括：将接口从GB/T 20234硬件改为IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流），因为贝宁遵循法语区IEC对齐方向，GB/T接口与IEC 62196车辆接口在物理上不兼容；ANM合格评定及ARE / SBEE项目协调要求基于IEC 61851的安全证据；IEC 61000系列EMC证据；任何并网安装须经SBEE并网协调（220/380 V、50 Hz）；以及针对贝宁西非热带气候的高温和灰尘降额文件。关键在于，贝宁电动汽车市场处于极度初期：四轮电动汽车普及率可忽略不计，电网电气化尚不完善，近期最具相关性的电动汽车细分市场是电动两轮和三轮车（电摩 / 电三轮），而非乘用车快充桩。出口商在承诺发货前，必须客观评估需求、基础设施就绪程度和项目融资。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认针对电动汽车充电桩产品类别的单一官方强制认证路径；适用路径为ANM合格评定 + ARE / SBEE项目协调 + IEC技术标准。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入貝寧時，已確認的實務差距包括：將接口從GB/T 20234硬體改為IEC 62196 Type 2（交流）/ CCS2（直流），因為貝寧遵循法語區IEC對齊方向，GB/T接口與IEC 62196車輛接口在物理上不兼容；ANM合格評定及ARE / SBEE項目協調要求基於IEC 61851的安全證據；IEC 61000系列EMC證據；任何併網安裝須經SBEE併網協調（220/380 V、50 Hz）；以及針對貝寧西非熱帶氣候的高溫和灰塵降額文件。關鍵在於，貝寧電動汽車市場處於極度初期：四輪電動汽車普及率可忽略不計，電網電氣化尚不完善，近期最具相關性的電動汽車細分市場是電動兩輪和三輪車（電摩 / 電三輪），而非乘用車快充樁。出口商在承諾發貨前，必須客觀評估需求、基礎設施就緒程度和項目融資。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認針對電動汽車充電樁產品類別的單一官方強制認證路徑；適用路徑為ANM合格評定 + ARE / SBEE項目協調 + IEC技術標準。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ANM conformity determination, ARE / SBEE project approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, project developers, and installers should verify current Benin conformity assessment rules, SBEE grid-connection requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation. Benin's EV regulatory framework is at an early stage of development; requirements may change materially as the market evolves.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ANM合格评定裁定、ARE / SBEE项目审批、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、项目开发商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行贝宁合格评定规则、SBEE并网要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。贝宁电动汽车监管框架尚处于发展初期，随着市场演进，相关要求可能发生重大变化。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ANM合格評定裁定、ARE / SBEE項目審批、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、項目開發商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行貝寧合格評定規則、SBEE併網要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。貝寧電動汽車監管框架尚處於發展初期，隨著市場演進，相關要求可能發生重大變化。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
